description: Completion contract binding the unistd/process/filesystem wave-05 fixture, executor support, refreshed coverage truth, structured telemetry, and remote-rch validation commands.

source_artifacts.evidence: Tracker rows for bd-waaa6, bd-waaa6.1, and bd-waaa6.2.
Strict and hardened deterministic fixtures for the 12 completed unistd/process/filesystem wave-05 symbols.
execute_fixture_case dispatch and deterministic unistd/process/filesystem wave-05 fixture executor.
Harness tests for wave-05 fixture schema, both-mode coverage, structured logs, ambient-state exclusion, and isolated execution.
Canonical coverage artifact refreshed by bd-waaa6.1 after unistd wave-05 and stdio wave-01 landed.
Per-symbol fixture rows linking every wave-05 symbol to unistd_process_filesystem_wave05.json.
Campaign prioritizer no longer lists completed wave-05 symbols as next unistd/process/filesystem work.
Machine-readable binding for bd-waaa6.2 completion obligations.
Fail-closed checker for source bindings, coverage accounting, telemetry, and remote-rch validation commands.
Rust harness tests for the wave-05 completion contract and negative drift signatures.

required_validation_commands: RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=true RCH_VISIBILITY=summary rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/rch_target_frankenlibc_browntern_unistd_wave05_completion_test cargo test -p frankenlibc-harness --test unistd_process_filesystem_wave05_completion_contract_test -- --nocapture

RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=true RCH_VISIBILITY=summary rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/rch_target_frankenlibc_browntern_unistd_wave05_completion_check cargo check -p frankenlibc-harness --test unistd_process_filesystem_wave05_completion_contract_test

RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=true RCH_VISIBILITY=summary rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/rch_target_frankenlibc_browntern_unistd_wave05_completion_clippy cargo clippy -p frankenlibc-harness --test unistd_process_filesystem_wave05_completion_contract_test -- -D warnings

RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=true RCH_VISIBILITY=summary rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/rch_target_frankenlibc_browntern_unistd_wave05_conformance cargo test -p frankenlibc-harness --test unistd_process_filesystem_wave05_conformance_test -- --nocapture
